arts.ttl: Juventus vs. Stuttgart preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's UEFA Champions League clash between Juventus and Stuttgart, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Juventus monitoring situation of Manchester United forward
arts.sum: Juventus are monitoring the situation of Joshua Zirkzee at Manchester United and could launch a loan move to sign the striker next summer. Zirkzee signed for Manchester United in a £34m deal from Bologna in the summer but has struggled to make an impact in the Premier League. arts.ttl: 5 reasons why Stuttgart will beat Juventus in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: That total becomes four when we include their 5-0 win over Preußen Münster in the DFB Cup. So far, whether it be in the Bundesliga, Champions League or the DFB Cup, Sebastian Hoeneß’s side have managed to find the back of the net in every game they have played except one, which will cause Juventus plenty of concern. They both boast a goal each coming off the bench, with Demirović’s late equaliser against Hoffenheim proving especially important, and they have proven their ability to play either as a front two or seperately as a lone striker.
